item.title: Cohere 副总裁表示，企业人工智能主权需要在 VB Transform 2026 上控制整个代理堆栈
item.summary: Hundreds of enterprise leaders and technical experts packed the main ballroom of the luxurious Hotel Nia in Menlo Park this week for VB Transform 2026 , the year's preeminent conference on using generative AI agents to drive business outcomes.
